75426.subject: Now earn up to €250 for a limited time
75426.body:
Invite a friend to Kraken and you each get rewarded when they
start trading.    
Kraken ( https://link.kraken.com/f/a/U9r5JfNrAvboAuEejY-tng~~/AAQRxRA~/7wv_FfLXl5GJO92MXzbAifvftXAYcQp8VeReNZjZ41XHzOBqaI1Tew72Y9yYpDl7Oz9yUXz6HJEAN_3CT8Jlr7Gt5DeSRKGMRjo3myj1bgDu9zy6O-5q-10zg-mS6OYotEAIwCf3rBSxlI6b6piEDg~~ )

( https://link.kraken.com/f/a/5s1kv8U2_oCX7Nq_EA6KXw~~/AAQRxRA~/7wv_FfLXl5GJO92MXzbAifvftXAYcQp8VeReNZjZ41XHzOBqaI1Tew72Y9yYpDl7OKtuXJtQyn9cnozG2N7QCPEnbL5WoSL68R2vrGUQJzoymBYYd0QYEuEGR2mOfqO1ASQp2g2b0fuvp7Wu_rWv8g~~ )

*******************************
Invite friends, earn up to €250
*******************************

Both of you get rewarded.

Share now  
( https://link.kraken.com/f/a/EemaMKv8mh3iu_uQZHMicg~~/AAQRxRA~/l88HXnhYezlowwpt-Q-4kn4il4TPi0b_CjCKXmLxBZkfcMLavX2El2L0C2sLLD_9gSp08T2EIfQa3pFicrR1tIkln9f4pLzn82q0tjjQJSS3sKIhsBW19QaLvRcfo515Pp0xAtRZWXE3QpIQ11fgzA~~ )
Refer a friend 
( https://link.kraken.com/f/a/_mxW_4WjmSSd0y1ZYRBwMg~~/AAQRxRA~/l88HXnhYezlowwpt-Q-4kn4il4TPi0b_CjCKXmLxBZkfcMLavX2El2L0C2sLLD_96SnEF6Bk-orKbwhGQtYqH-v0cp81o5O5hyCbelQz8aep6LrquhljFp_esqqlAvHpTyrqG0mo1jfGXd2Dvyu5Mg~~ )

------------
How to start
------------

For a limited time, inviting a friend to Kraken pays off even
more.

When a friend joins with your link and gets started, you now
earn up to €250 — and your friend earns a reward too.

Here is how it works:

* Share your referral link with a friend
* Your friend signs up, then deposits and trades €200 in 30 days
* You both get rewarded
Now is the moment to send it. MiCA rules are in force across
the EU, and a friend may still be on an exchange that is not
MiCA-authorised such as Binance, MEXC and many more.

Kraken has been trusted since 2011, with MiCA authorisation via
the Central Bank of Ireland and quarterly Proof of Reserves,
independently verified.

Even more, once your friend joins Kraken, they can also opt into
the €1M draw — on top of the reward you both earn. Every euro
they deposit before 31 Jul earns one entry.

Share now  
( https://link.kraken.com/f/a/ihp343iTsHoRIZMtayKYDA~~/AAQRxRA~/l88HXnhYezlowwpt-Q-4kn4il4TPi0b_CjCKXmLxBZkfcMLavX2El2L0C2sLLD_9o7v3XzxyEC4vAUManNUs6-asZ57mmPXcbzynEPn3e97jDPBI7DAWAboUaSzwx_otJ2wui2Qo7XgkVZ4FCB20-A~~ )
Sign in ( https://link.kraken.com/f/a/APao1LrB3aCRwx71U3b4ag~~/AAQRxRA~/7wv_FfLXl5GJO92MXzbAifvftXAYcQp8VeReNZjZ41XHzOBqaI1Tew72Y9yYpDl7v6pcc4Nc5iP0XA9ylQbDVYczED3dP90f8x70mq7h6kuMa6KcxLR9X6XbRBmCmc6s-B73PlrNsb_g-pk5MYuCpw~~ )
• Get support ( https://link.kraken.com/f/a/cyDFPHeR56GYLno6ywGCbA~~/AAQRxRA~/6TNhWInUCf4avBQ4xCljUkjgaq2kROR7pEClMOWyMBSk65Magrk3ng1R8nq9GV6ywemy52eB2yczFYQNPds8pNU_O8GFJWzQ7tXbjvhQM1509lXeJdMHYjkxtm-5N39LAnppkt6dVOQphDvVRtFMkQ~~ )

75424.subject: 📈 Bitcoin breaks 62K as crypto outperforms equities
75424.body:
Today’s newsletter is brought to you by **[Choose Rich Live](https://www.youtube.com/@chooserichnick/streams)**[!](https://www.youtube.com/@chooserichnick/streams)

Our very own Nick O’Neill is has launched a new stream covering crypto, finance, AI, tech, and the stories shaping the internet economy.

If you already follow Nick, you know what to expect: sharp takes, market chaos, founder brain, and the occasional banger you’ll see clipped on the timeline five minutes later.

Episodes will be streaming live on YouTube, so make sure you’re subscribed to catch the next one as it happens.

**[Subscribe to Choose Rich Live!](https://www.youtube.com/@chooserichnick/streams)**

———————————————————————————

## Top Stories

**BTC** $62,080 (1.3%) | **ETH** $1,740 (5.4%) | **SOL** $81 (-0.9%)

* Spot Bitcoin ETFs break 10-day outflow with [$222 million in daily net inflows](https://x.com/solidintel_x/status/2072945325224931825?s=20) yesterday

* Bitcoin [breaks $62K](https://x.com/WatcherGuru/status/2072683179245506896?s=20)

* The Dow Jones closes at a [new all-time high](https://x.com/KobeissiLetter/status/2072773557327732952?s=20)

* Tokenomist reports on eight different crypto tokens that have outpaced supply growth with [buybacks](https://x.com/solidintel_x/status/2072945325224931825?s=20)

* Anthropic hopes to [add Fable 5 back](https://x.com/trq212/status/2072814903170408784?s=20) to Claude Max subscriptions over time when capacity allows — In talks with Samsung to develop [custom chip](https://x.com/tradfi/status/2072679521107812392?s=20)

* SanDisk falls [below 20-day moving average](https://x.com/Barchart/status/2072886493924790429?s=20) for the first time since March

* Trump claims during interview that he [did not know how much money](https://x.com/DegenerateNews/status/2072806744342876287?s=20) his family has made off crypto

* Alibaba [bans Claude Code](https://x.com/Reuters/status/2072938565298721198?s=20) over backdoor risks.

* Meta's new model, code-named [Watermelon](https://x.com/CharlesRollet1/status/2072831703111045435?s=20), catches up to GPT 5.5

* Digital asset tokenization platform company Securitize gets [listed on the NYSE](https://x.com/WuBlockchain/status/2072699405527101614?s=20)

* Amazon launches [satellite internet company](https://x.com/Cointelegraph/status/2072757306320691652?s=20) to compete with Starlink

———————————————————————————


———

You are reading a plain text version of this post. For the best experience, copy and paste this link in your browser to view the post online:
https://www.dailybones.com/p/bitcoin-breaks-62k-as-crypto-outperforms-equities

75421.subject: 🦞 AI Inequality Warning
75421.body: 96 🦞 AI Inequality Warning @media only screen and (max-width: 620px) { table.body { width: 100%; min-width: 100%; } table.body .content { padding: 0 !important; } table.body .container { padding: 0 !important; width: 100% !important; } table.body .main { border-spacing: 10px 0 !important; border-left-width: 0 !important; border-radius: 0 !important; border-right-width: 0 !important; } table.body .img-responsive { height: auto !important; max-width: 100% !important; width: auto !important; } } @media all { .ExternalClass { width: 100%; } .ExternalClass, .ExternalClass p, .ExternalClass span, .ExternalClass font, .ExternalClass td, .ExternalClass div { line-height: 100%; } .apple-link a { color: inherit !important; font-family: inherit !important; font-size: inherit !important; font-weight: inherit !important; line-height: inherit !important; text-decoration: none !important; } #MessageViewBody a { color: inherit; text-decoration: none; font-size: inherit; font-family: inherit; font-weight: inherit; line-height: inherit; } } @media only screen and (max-width: 620px) { table[class=body] h1 { font-size: 28px !important; margin-bottom: 10px !important; } table[class=body] p, table[class=body] ul, table[class=body] ol, table[class=body] td, table[class=body] span, table[class=body] a { font-size: 16px !important; } table[class=body] .wrapper, table[class=body] .article { padding: 10px !important; } table[class=body] .content { padding: 0 !important; } table[class=body] .container { padding: 0 !important; width: 100% !important; } table[class=body] .main { border-left-width: 0 !important; border-radius: 0 !important; border-right-width: 0 !important; } table[class=body] .btn table { width: 100% !important; } table[class=body] .btn a { width: 100% !important; } table[class=body] .img-responsive { height: auto !important; max-width: 100% !important; width: auto !important; } table[class=body] p[class=small], table[class=body] a[class=small] { font-size: 11px !important; } } .kg-nft-link { display: block; text-decoration: none !important; color: #000000 !important; font-family: inherit !important; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.3; padding-top: 4px; padding-right: 20px; padding-left: 20px; padding-bottom: 4px; } .kg-twitter-link { display: block; text-decoration: none !important; color: #000000 !important; font-family: inherit !important; font-size: 15px; padding: 8px; line-height: 1.3; } .kg-cta-link-accent .kg-cta-sponsor-label a { color: #ff4141 !important; } .kg-cta-text a:not(.kg-cta-link-accent .kg-cta-text a) { color: #000000; text-decoration: none; } .kg-cta-link-accent .kg-cta-text a { color: #ff4141 !important; } @media only screen and (max-width: 620px) { table.body .kg-bookmark-card { width: 90vw; } table.body .kg-bookmark-thumbnail { display: none !important; } table.body .kg-bookmark-metadata span { font-size: 13px !important; } table.body .kg-embed-card { max-width: 90vw !important; } table.body .kg-cta-card { padding: 0 20px; } table.body .

03 Jul 2026 11:20 UTC

Manage Email Preferences ( https://link.coinmarketcap.com/f/a/TFX_JByS1uSIceBuD136JA~~/AAQRxRA~/oP1ryep39J5O8_LR5wTS14-0OUCiV5d1jqEQh4lmP1X7_fnerWLV8a1exdZLwVWMCBj76PBGju4QhVZqlZ9PFAISuXG6IMd-H49tyYc7aNblxMsu3feDfc6jwVDwcuMyfS9hFsJ4leD_cyWbAACUTARF7_PH9vQbzIzilcvom9zf-S2Ur6Q9tIvsCC-Lz4HWB93ghr0kHWWthCGUzECp2Gm9X4iDNYNZz5umR9F0LyUlV-Vf7oBROdKXOslLxD85yj99HAxvgL0rOHAU86LCrHFS3KRKNFcQ4NTnOSafvyu1bxGCijD43tY_mZA-klgFZSR77CgG_4rVGsyTyBiBQ_5CIdbRj8iqspFBtK7liAix0N8bMu826DJLjq1eDO3y0C0fBiR-ChBQSkkrAvYKTcnLDUFl-cYtNv9V2nGrB5HgSZ8D8fUAD-FjkQ7WfVvjG06z4bBgLlc5dXqzbrPX01ewLD2nt2QTPUIfGtYmoH1WeiTlqWGUcwjB-K3XIEBu1jIlyeKC7__Ezn03VhdsTiJZWYLnaqbVE0kixHy_zJixwzozZ8siBI-IAzESWpXHQxWTDXBaot-nV3SUgXcPpiAYYVuCsNERRpyerrkw8i_-Xw4ScZIo-NZTELe4FLY2I-iPlFw656Vlf_uFDlu1r2LD32Mf7x-NIEGDivmu0BzjS2ObwVcHVcLKnUeOA1YQkVpTfnFwG40N8Wam-n8XYnyuAM4DoU96Gcabfc7g2jNAr2wdAuCKySxezmy49RgoDYPew00V8p05tTtA1InKai5Z6JCfngBo7Xuai_0_scvgzADwUc8Lk45CFJ9ZcxfkN1-tnJ4-FNStKQCDqQchVesHHjfFeS7YIY8HS4dWOVHU49cWZemXxu6Hu8l8CwiEXX986y72SL6B5-nQWr356m_TgZI4K9fu2NOF1CbiBBldGsFBzgMaRM5nhzuFPGw0G_zzqGIenu3asOKjlNtD_Zh9R3Zmf51C6g2nAjIxmNLebEnCuK3xo3sKTtcDEUXJ0Rmf3q0xZU_K0k-dHOVODbaMqGR89-jbemrps3xCVwWz8Iuk_whNAfGtGrNJ-1W606r26ovB2FnOGslLPPzTeLlCqI-CRhnhU4jgwOSJkAk~ )

Fear and Greed is at
23
(Fear)
and BTC is at
$62K
this morning. Yesterday's 1% market bounce held as whale buying
absorbed the $2T floor and the broader market consolidated. Today
is the last full session before US markets close early for
Independence Day, keeping volume thin through the weekend.

The price action is quiet. The structural moves underneath it
are not. In one 24-hour window, a company listed on the NYSE and
simultaneously tokenized its own shares on-chain, a global bank
became the first G-SIB to offer USDC minting, and the Robinhood
CEO went on CNBC to say real-world assets are crypto's next
phase.

Let's dive in.

Latest News
-----------

Standard Chartered Became the First Major Bank to Offer USDC
Minting

Standard Chartered announced on July 2 that institutional
clients can now mint and redeem USDC directly through the bank,
without opening a separate Circle account. It is the first Global
Systemically Important Bank to offer this access.
